title: Hand Drawn Photo Annotation Overlay AI
sourceTitle: Hand Drawn Photo Annotation Overlay AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Playful hand-drawn illustration overlay on fictional cafe portrait preserved as the base photo with hand-drawn annotation marks pointing to outfit and lighting details, built around city walk moment with gestures traced by loose doodles and small arrows around the photo edges. Subject: fictional cafe portrait preserved as the base photo with hand-drawn annotation marks pointing to outfit and lighting details is the base photo subject, kept visually stable while expressive doodles interact with gestures, clothing, light, objects, and scene edges without overwhelming the original photo feel. Scene: city walk moment with gestures traced by loose doodles and small arrows around the photo edges defines how the doodles react to the moment: tracing movement, following gestures, circling details, adding arrows, and bringing context-specific imaginative notes into the frame. Composition: Fixed balanced photo-plus-doodle composition: original-looking photo remains crisp and dominant, hand-drawn marks sit on top like pen strokes on a print, annotations stay around edges or relevant details, and the face or main subject stays unobstructed. Signature Elements: Crisp base photo, loose pen doodles, gesture-tracing lines, playful arrows, small handwritten captions, sketchbook roughness, edge annotations, and balanced editorial photo-study finish. Style: Loose spontaneous hand-drawn sketchbook overlay with wobbly lines, organic curves, rough pen strokes, playful arrows, small circles, washi-tape note feeling, deliberate editorial annotation design, and crisp photo base underneath. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Photo-first candid or editorial framing with doodles layered in screen space, preserving the base image crop, perspective, face readability, and key scene details. Typography: tiny readable captions: good light, tiny win, keep going appears as tiny handwritten captions that are clever, context-specific, readable, and integrated with arrows or small annotation marks rather than generic filler. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Composition: Fixed balanced photo-plus-doodle composition: original-looking photo remains crisp and dominant, hand-drawn marks sit on top like pen strokes on a print, annotations stay around edges or relevant details, and the face or main subject stays unobstructed. Signature Elements: Crisp base photo, loose pen doodles, gesture-tracing lines, playful arrows, small handwritten captions, sketchbook roughness, edge annotations, and balanced editorial photo-study finish. Style: Loose spontaneous hand-drawn sketchbook overlay with wobbly lines, organic curves, rough pen strokes, playful arrows, small circles, washi-tape note feeling, deliberate editorial annotation design, and crisp photo base underneath. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Photo-first candid or editorial framing with doodles layered in screen space, preserving the base image crop, perspective, face readability, and key scene details. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
